description: Welcome Home to Beautifully updated 3 Bdrm, 3 Bath, end unit in well sought after Murrayville Glen! Bright spacious corner unit boasts open Living-Rm. w/ Gas FP to Dining area w/ sliding door to quiet yard w/extended patio. Plenty of Cabinet & Counter space in Kitchen w/ Breakfast Bar, SS appliances, adjacent to Family/Flex room; & Powder/Laundry room. Upstairs: 3 Bdrms w/ Spacious Primary Bdrm, 4 pc ensuite, & 4 pc Main Bathrm. Updates include paint, flooring, light fixtures & potlights on the main floor, updated Electrical/Plumbing, Toilets, New Windows & HWT! Gated Family Complex offers a Built-in Play area, Clubhouse & Exercise Rm. Short walk to Ross Park & Murrayville Amenities, Schools, Shopping, Restaurants, Cafes, Parks, Public Library, W.C. Blair Pool/Rec Centre & Public Transit.
